instructions.name: add_dispute_evidence
docs: Add evidence to an existing dispute (client or freelancer only)

instructions.name: approve_milestone
docs: Approve a milestone and release payment

instructions.name: approve_work
docs: Client approves submitted work and releases payment
Separate from complete_job - this is the happy path after review

instructions.name: cancel_job
docs: Cancel a job and refund escrow if applicable
CRITICAL: Can only cancel if work has NOT been submitted

instructions.name: cast_staked_vote
docs: Cast a staked vote on a dispute

instructions.name: claim_arbitrator_fee
docs: Claim arbitrator fee for voting on a dispute

instructions.name: claim_staking_reward
docs: Claim staking reward after dispute resolution

instructions.name: complete_job
docs: Complete a job (client marks work as complete and releases payment)

instructions.name: create_job
docs: Create a new job posting

instructions.name: create_milestone
docs: Create a single milestone for a job

instructions.name: deposit_escrow
docs: Deposit funds into escrow for a job

instructions.name: deposit_token_escrow
docs: Deposit SPL tokens into escrow

instructions.name: dispute_milestone
docs: Open dispute for a specific milestone

instructions.name: distribute_arbitrator_fees
docs: Distribute fees to arbitrators after dispute resolution

instructions.name: finalize_kyc
docs: Finalize KYC — record face comparison result (Verified / Rejected)

instructions.name: fund_milestone
docs: Fund a specific milestone escrow

instructions.name: init_dispute_config
docs: Initialize dispute configuration

instructions.name: init_job_milestones
docs: Initialize milestone configuration for a job

instructions.name: init_juror_registry
docs: Initialize juror registry

instructions.name: init_sbt_counter
docs: Initialize SBT counter for a user

instructions.name: initialize_reputation
docs: Initialize reputation for a user

instructions.name: mark_message_read
docs: Mark a message as read

instructions.name: mint_achievement_nft
docs: Mint achievement NFT for reaching milestones

instructions.name: mint_job_completion_nft
docs: Mint job completion NFT as proof of work

instructions.name: mint_reputation_sbt
docs: Mint a reputation SBT after job completion

instructions.name: open_dispute
docs: Open a dispute

instructions.name: open_token_dispute
docs: Open dispute for token escrow

instructions.name: raise_dispute
docs: Freelancer raises dispute after work rejection
Opens the DAO voting mechanism

instructions.name: reject_milestone
docs: Reject a milestone work submission

instructions.name: reject_work
docs: Client rejects submitted work
CRITICAL: Funds stay in escrow, freelancer can raise dispute

instructions.name: release_escrow
docs: Release escrow payment to freelancer (client approves work)

instructions.name: release_token_escrow
docs: Release SPL token escrow to freelancer

instructions.name: reset_kyc
docs: Reset KYC — set record back to Pending

instructions.name: resolve_dispute
docs: Resolve dispute based on votes

accounts.name: resolver
docs: Anyone involved in the dispute (client, freelancer, or a voter) must sign

instructions.name: resolve_staked_dispute
docs: Resolve a staked dispute after voting period ends

instructions.name: resolve_token_dispute
docs: Resolve token dispute

instructions.name: revoke_sbt
docs: Revoke an SBT (admin action for fraud)

instructions.name: select_bid
docs: Select a winning bid and assign freelancer

instructions.name: select_jurors
docs: Select random jurors for a dispute

instructions.name: send_message
docs: Send a message to another user

instructions.name: stake_for_jury
docs: Stake tokens to become eligible as a juror

instructions.name: submit_bid
docs: Submit a bid for a job

instructions.name: submit_kyc
docs: Submit KYC — creates or resets record to Pending

instructions.name: submit_milestone_work
docs: Submit work for a specific milestone

instructions.name: submit_review
docs: Submit a review/rating after job completion

instructions.name: submit_work
docs: Submit work deliverables
Freelancer submits work deliverables
CRITICAL: Changes job status to WaitingForReview, preventing cancellation

instructions.name: unstake_from_jury
docs: Unstake tokens and leave the juror pool

accounts.name: verifier
docs: Verifier must be an authorized oracle or admin

instructions.name: vote_dispute
docs: Vote on dispute (arbitrators with high reputation)
AUTO-RESOLVES when 2 votes are reached

types.name: ChatMessage
docs: Chat message account - stores individual messages on-chain

fields.name: sender
docs: Sender's wallet address

fields.name: recipient
docs: Recipient's wallet address

fields.name: content
docs: Encrypted message content (max 280 chars like Twitter)

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp when message was sent

fields.name: read
docs: Whether message has been read

fields.name: message_id
docs: Message ID (unique per conversation)

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA

types.name: MessageSent
docs: Chat events
